description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on a schedule, on push to any branch, on pull requests to main and develop, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to run a build job on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest) and Python versions (3.11, 3.6, 3.7, 3.8, 3.9, 3.10, pypy-3.9). For each job, check out the code, set up Python, install dependencies with make install, run tests with make test or unittest, and upload coverage to Codecov for ubuntu-latest with Python 3.11.
